description: Create the complete Kiro spec for Tether: requirements.md, design.md, and tasks.md in .kiro/specs/tether/
steps: Write requirements.md with user stories (synced playback, multi-room, host dashboard, chat/reactions, room management, embedded sources, network resilience) and non-functional requirements

Write design.md with architecture overview, component structure, data models, WebSocket protocol, sync engine design, multi-room linking, video delivery, chat/reactions, connection management, REST API, frontend routing, and build pipeline
Write tasks.md with 10 ordered implementation tasks covering scaffolding through integration testing, each with detailed steps and acceptance criteria
acceptance_criteria: .kiro/specs/tether/requirements.md exists with 7 user stories and NFRs
.kiro/specs/tether/design.md exists with full architecture and protocol specification
.kiro/specs/tether/tasks.md exists with 10 ordered tasks and dependency graph
findings: All three spec files created successfully. Task 7 (Frontend Room Join and Core Layout) implemented as vanilla TS with Bun bundler - no framework needed. Build produces dist/index.html + dist/assets/index.js (~9KB minified). All 188 backend tests pass. Task 9 (Chat, Reactions, Dashboard) completed - chat store, chat UI with emoji picker, floating reactions overlay, host dashboard with participant stats/kick/force-resync, all wired into App.ts. Build passes cleanly.
